title_en: Public consultation — PPCMOI 2026-041 (Le Toit Vert residential project)
title_fr: Consultation publique — PPCMOI 2026-041 (projet résidentiel Le Toit Vert)
summary_en: The Municipality of Ormstown gave public notice of a public consultation meeting on specific-project request PPCMOI 2026-041, held Thursday, July 2, 2026 at 6:00 p.m. at Town Hall, 5 rue Gale. A first draft resolution was adopted at the June 1, 2026 regular sitting under PPCMOI by-laws 114-2021 and 169-2025. The project would authorize a residential development of four three-storey multifamily buildings, each with 6 dwellings (24 units total), on vacant lot 6 455 729, adjacent to the Le Toit Vert restaurant at 52 rue Church, in zone R-7. The resolution contains provisions subject to referendum approval. Notice certified by Daniel Leduc, Director General and Clerk-Treasurer, on June 22, 2026.
summary_fr: La Municipalité d'Ormstown a donné avis public d'une assemblée publique de consultation portant sur la demande de projet particulier PPCMOI 2026-041, tenue le jeudi 2 juillet 2026 à 18 h à l'Hôtel de Ville, 5, rue Gale. Un premier projet de résolution a été adopté à la séance ordinaire du 1er juin 2026 en vertu des règlements PPCMOI 114-2021 et 169-2025. Le projet vise à autoriser un projet domiciliaire de quatre immeubles multifamiliaux de trois étages, chacun comptant 6 logements (24 logements au total), sur le lot vacant 6 455 729, adjacent au restaurant Le Toit Vert au 52, rue Church, dans la zone R-7. La résolution contient des dispositions susceptibles d'approbation référendaire. Avis certifié par Daniel Leduc, directeur général et greffier-trésorier, le 22 juin 2026.
full_translation_en:
PUBLIC NOTICE — Public consultation meeting

The Municipality of Ormstown gives notice, to all interested persons, of a public consultation meeting concerning specific-project request PPCMOI 2026-041.

The meeting is held on Thursday, July 2, 2026, at 6:00 p.m., at the Town Hall, 5 rue Gale, Ormstown. At the meeting, the project is presented and those present may ask questions and submit comments.

At its regular sitting of June 1, 2026, the municipal council adopted a first draft resolution on this request, under the by-law respecting specific construction, alteration or occupancy proposals for an immovable (PPCMOI), by-law 114-2021 and its replacement by-law 169-2025.

The purpose of the request is to authorize a residential project consisting of four (4) three-storey multifamily buildings, each containing six (6) dwellings, for a total of twenty-four (24) dwellings, on the vacant lot bearing number 6 455 729 of the Québec cadastre, located adjacent to the Le Toit Vert restaurant at 52 rue Church, in zone R-7.

The draft resolution contains one or more provisions that may be subject to approval by the persons qualified to vote (referendum approval).

The draft resolution may be consulted at the municipal offices during regular business hours.

Given at Ormstown, June 22, 2026.
Daniel Leduc, Director General and Clerk-Treasurer.
attribution: This unofficial translation was prepared using NEST, an AI-assisted civic information workflow developed by strAI.ca. Readers should refer to the original source document for the official version.
